text.title: Performance Domains Overview Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Performance Domains Overview methodology end-to-end.

step.name: collect-artefacts
step.input: Plans + status reports + retros + risk register
step.action: Read 8 weeks of project artefacts; flag missing types.

step.name: score-each-domain
step.action: Score each of 8 domains on 1-5; record >=2 evidence anchors per domain.
step.decision-gate: If any domain has <2 evidence anchors, halt and gather more.

step.name: write-remediations
step.action: Write >=1 remediation per domain scoring <=2; assign owner + due.

step.name: sanity-check-distribution
step.action: If avg >=4.5, require sponsor sign-off; if all >=4 and no remediations, recalibrate.

step.name: publish-and-debrief
step.action: Publish to project doc repo; 30-min debrief with sponsor to commit to remediations.
